scqa.situation: The accepted baseline for FlashAttention-4 runtime prediction on B200 is the FA4 paper roofline. It is simple and interpretable but explicitly omits occupancy, L2/HBM/TMA bandwidth, and precision-specific throughput.
scqa.complication: These omissions are likely the dominant source of prediction error, especially for small sequence lengths and FP8/FP4 precisions, so the baseline may not meet the useful-improvement threshold.
scqa.question: Can we extend the roofline with white-box B200-specific terms to reduce held-out MAPE without violating the no-query-execution constraint?
scqa.answer: Yes — add tile-occupancy, effective HBM/L2/TMA bandwidth, and precision-specific MMA/exponential terms, then calibrate on a disjoint calibration split and validate on held-out data.

sections.mechanism_summary: The predictor computes stage times for MMA, SMEM, HBM/L2/TMA, and exponential ops, each scaled by an occupancy factor and, where applicable, an effective-bandwidth or precision-throughput factor. The predicted runtime is the maximum of the scaled stage times plus a small launch overhead.
citation_markers: [1] FlashAttention-4 paper: seed roofline and algorithm structure.
[2] White-box GPU modeling paper: occupancy and memory-hierarchy correction methodology.
[3] Blackwell microbenchmark paper: SMEM and MUFU per-SM throughput constants.
references: [1] arXiv 2603.05451v1, FlashAttention-4: Algorithm and Kernel Pipelining Co-Design for Asymmetric Hardware Scaling.
[2] arXiv 2605.04178v1, white-box GPU performance modeling methodology.
code_level_plan: Implement constants.py with B200 SM count, clock, SMEM/MUFU/MMA rates per precision, and placeholder effective-bandwidth curve.
Implement predictor.py with functions for each stage and occupancy resolution.
Implement calibrate.py to fit effective-bandwidth and occupancy factors on the calibration split.
Implement evaluate.py to compute MAPE, max APE, 30%-error coverage, and bottleneck labels on held-out validation.
Run ablations: baseline, occupancy-only, TMA/L2-only, precision-only, combined.
risks: Implementation-specific scheduling noise may dominate, making white-box terms insufficient.
Tile sizes and launch bounds may not be extractable from the FA4 repo without significant effort.
Calibration split may be too small to fit effective-bandwidth curves robustly.
sections.falsification_and_abandonment: Falsified if combined model does not beat baseline MAPE by >= 5 percentage points on held-out validation after two calibration rounds. Abandon and return to idea/optimize if the useful-improvement threshold is also missed.

summary: Selected idea draft for the FlashAttention-4 B200 white-box runtime model.
title: Selected Idea Draft: Combined Occupancy/TMA-L2/Precision Analytical Predictor
